titleJa: workflow tooling が agent の複雑さに追いつき始める
titleEn: Workflow tooling is starting to catch up with agent complexity
summaryJa: 2025年11月時点では、OpenAI AgentKit、Microsoft Agent Framework、Claude Agent SDK、GPT-5 for developers がそろい、agent graph、connector、chat UI、trace grading、workflow orchestration をまとめて扱う tooling layer が実体を持ち始めていた。
summaryEn: By November 2025, OpenAI AgentKit, Microsoft Agent Framework, the Claude Agent SDK, and GPT-5 for developers were making a real tooling layer visible, one that combines agent graphs, connectors, chat UI, trace grading, and workflow orchestration.

publishedSources.label: Magentic-One: A Generalist Multi-Agent System for Solving Complex Tasks
RE-Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI R&D Capabilities of Language Model Agents against Human Experts
OpenAI: New tools and features in the Responses API
Google Cloud: Introducing Looker MCP Server
Google Cloud: Firestore support and custom tools in MCP Toolbox
Anthropic: Building agents with the Claude Agent SDK
Microsoft Azure: Agent Factory, designing the open agentic web stack
